steps.title: Find the logical link
steps.content: The first sentence states the artist’s wish to avoid harsh synthetic dyes. The second sentence describes her action of experimenting with natural dyes. The relationship is one of reason—she acted because of that wish—so the blank needs a phrase that shows cause.

steps.title: Apply the reason signal
steps.content: C) With this in mind, works as an introductory prepositional phrase meaning 'considering that', which correctly introduces the reason for her experimenting. A) In actuality, B) To sum up, and D) Nevertheless, each add contrast, summary, or clarification that does not fit the cause‑effect link. That matches choice C — C is correct.
